title: Psalm 46:10 - Morning Stillness Print
description: Be still and know. Watercolor hand-lettered scripture ideal for the opening of a morning reflection segment. #morningreflections #scripture #radioprepinspo
alt_text: Hand-lettered Psalm 46:10 watercolor print in warm cream and gold on linen-textured paper

title: Grief & Resilience Segment - Visual Mood
description: Soft dawn photography suitable as backdrop for episodes on loss, hope after hardship, and carrying one another through. #WGSP1490 #radioshow #faithandhealing
alt_text: Misty sunrise over a quiet field with soft golden light breaking through pale blue fog

title: Community & Belonging - Listener Story Visual
description: Warm gathering imagery for the listener story segment on finding community after isolation. #listenermail #communityhealing
alt_text: Hands gathered around a lit candle at a table with soft amber light and blurred faces

title: Morning Pages Journal Setup - Minimal Desk
description: Simple journaling setup for morning pages practice. Wide-rule notebook, coffee, and a window. #morningpages #journaling #devotionallife
alt_text: Open journal with handwritten lines beside a steaming coffee mug on a wooden desk at dawn

title: Howard Thurman Quote - The Work of Christmas
description: Timeless wisdom from Howard Thurman on finding purpose after the season of celebration. Perfect for January devotional reading. #HowardThurman #theology #devotional
alt_text: Howard Thurman's Work of Christmas poem typeset in dark serif font on aged parchment background

title: Brené Brown - Vulnerability Quote Card
description: Connection is why we are here. Quote card for a prayer journal page on courage and showing up. #BreneBrown #quotecards #journaling
alt_text: Brené Brown quote card in warm terracotta tones with serif lettering on textured linen

title: Sunday Pot Roast with Carrots and Potatoes
description: Classic Sunday pot roast in a Dutch oven. Slow cook while you are at church and come home to comfort. #potroast #sundaydinner #southerncooking
alt_text: Cast iron Dutch oven filled with pot roast surrounded by golden carrots and russet potatoes

title: Grandma's Baked Macaroni and Cheese
description: Four-cheese baked mac with a breadcrumb crust. The kind that earns a second plate at Sunday dinner. #macandcheese #southernrecipes #comfortfood
alt_text: Golden-topped baked macaroni and cheese in a ceramic baking dish with bubbly cheese edges

title: Skillet Cornbread with Honey Butter
description: Cast iron skillet cornbread with a golden crust and honey butter on the side. Ready in 25 minutes. #cornbread #skilletrecipes #sundaybaking
alt_text: Round skillet cornbread with golden crust on a wooden board next to a small dish of honey butter

title: Southern Sweet Potato Pie
description: Old-fashioned sweet potato pie with a flaky butter crust. Not to be confused with pumpkin. This is the real one. #sweetpotatopie #southernbaking #Thanksgiving
alt_text: Sliced sweet potato pie with fluted crust edge on a linen tablecloth with cinnamon sticks beside it

title: Zinnia Cutting Garden Layout for Memphis Zone 7b
description: How to lay out a small cutting garden with zinnias and black-eyed Susans in a Memphis backyard. Full sun, low maintenance, pollinators love them. #zinnias #cuttinggarden #memphis #zone7b
alt_text: Raised bed diagram with zinnia and black-eyed Susan planting rows labeled for spacing and sun exposure

title: Lavender and Rosemary Together in One Bed
description: Mediterranean herbs that thrive in Memphis summers. Lavender for calm, rosemary for cooking. Plant on the south side of the house. #lavender #rosemary #herbgarden
alt_text: Interplanted lavender and rosemary in a raised herb bed with purple and silver-green foliage

title: Henri Nouwen - The Return of the Prodigal Son
description: Nouwen's reflection on Rembrandt's painting is one of the most healing theology books I have ever read. Required for anyone in pastoral care. #HenriNouwen #theology #books
alt_text: Book cover of Henri Nouwen's The Return of the Prodigal Son with Rembrandt painting detail

title: Barbara Kingsolver - Unsheltered
description: Two stories, two centuries, both asking what it means to hold a life together when the house is falling. Rich, grounding fiction. #BarbaraKingsolver #fiction #books
alt_text: Book cover of Barbara Kingsolver's Unsheltered with a decaying Victorian house illustration

title: APC CPE Units Tracker - 50-Hour Annual Requirement
description: How to document and submit continuing education units for Board Certified Chaplain renewal through the Association of Professional Chaplains. Deadline December 31 each year. #CPE #chaplaincy #APC #continuingeducation
alt_text: APC continuing education log sheet with certification renewal checklist and deadlines

title: Palliative Care Spiritual Screening Tools
description: FICA and HOPE spiritual history tools used in palliative care assessments. Useful reference for chaplains in oncology and ICU settings. #palliativecare #spiritualcare #chaplaincy
alt_text: FICA spiritual history tool infographic on a clean white background with four assessment categories

title: Compassion Fatigue Self-Assessment for Chaplains
description: ProQOL compassion fatigue scale adapted for healthcare chaplains. Self-monitoring resource for the annual review. #compassionfatigue #selfcare #chaplaincy
alt_text: ProQOL compassion fatigue scale printout with scoring guide and chaplain self-care notes

title: Gentle Saturday Morning Yoga - 20 Minutes
description: Low-intensity yoga flow good for Saturday morning before the radio show. Opens the chest and shoulders. No props needed. #yoga #morningroutine #wellness
alt_text: Woman in a light-filled room doing seated forward fold pose on a pale yoga mat

title: Memphis Greenline Walking Trail Map
description: The Shelby Farms Greenline is 10.65 miles of paved trail through Midtown and East Memphis. Perfect for 3-mile weekday walks. #memphis #greenline #walking #wellness
alt_text: Aerial trail map of the Shelby Farms Greenline with trailhead markers and parking areas highlighted

title: Winter Series Episode Art - Draft
description: Private reference for winter series graphic. Warm sunrise palette, clean sans-serif text, WGSP call letters. Canva template to build from.
alt_text: APC recertification hours Q3.
